cadence_note: Paced by the fastest-moving asset, IBTrACS: NCEI regenerates the v04r01 ALL best-track CSV several times a week during active cyclone seasons. Storm Events lands new yearly detail files monthly (with a roughly two-month reporting lag), RSI is regenerated a few times a year as storms are scored, and NESIS is frozen at its 2013-05-29 file. Every fetch is a stateless full re-pull, so a weekly tick simply picks up whatever moved.
